description: A comprehensive GitHub API server providing repository management, file operations, issue tracking, pull request workflows, and search capabilities.

tools.name: create_file
tools.description: Create a new file in a GitHub repository with specified content and commit message.

path.description: The file path within the repository.

content.description: The content to be written to the file.

message.description: The commit message for creating the file.

branch.description: The branch name where the file will be created.

commit_sha.description: The SHA hash of the commit that created the file.

file_sha.description: The SHA hash of the created file.

path.description: The file path within the repository.

tools.name: search_repositories
tools.description: Search for GitHub repositories using GitHub repository search syntax.

q.description: The search query using GitHub repository search syntax.

sort.description: The field to sort results by.

per_page.description: The number of results per page (max 100).

repositories.description: List of repositories matching the search criteria.

stars.description: The number of stars the repository has.

tools.name: create_repository
tools.description: Create a new GitHub repository in your account.

name.description: The name of the new repository.

private.description: Whether the repository should be private.

autoInit.description: Whether to initialize the repository with a README.md file.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: delete_repository
tools.description: Delete a GitHub repository.

deleted.description: Whether the repository was successfully deleted.

tools.name: get_file_contents
tools.description: Get file or directory contents from a GitHub repository.

branch.description: The branch name (defaults to repository default).

path.description: The file path within the repository.

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Delete a file from a GitHub repository.

message.description: The commit message for the deletion.

sha.description: The file SHA required for deletion.

commit_sha.description: The SHA hash of the commit that deleted the file.

path.description: The file path that was deleted.

deleted.description: Whether the file was successfully deleted.

tools.name: push_files
tools.description: Push multiple files to a GitHub repository in a single commit.

files.description: List of file operations to perform.

commit_sha.description: The SHA hash of the commit.

branch.description: The branch where changes were pushed.

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: create_pull_request
tools.description: Create a new pull request in a GitHub repository.

draft.description: Whether to create as draft PR.

maintainer_can_modify.description: Whether maintainer can modify the PR.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: fork_repository
tools.description: Fork a GitHub repository to your account or specified organization.

organization.description: The organization to fork to (defaults to personal account).

forked_from.description: The original repository that was forked.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch in a GitHub repository.

from_branch.description: The source branch (defaults to repository default).

sha.description: The SHA hash of the branch.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: list_branches
tools.description: List branches in a GitHub repository.

per_page.description: The number of results per page (default 30, max 100).

branches.description: List of branches in the repository.

sha.description: The SHA hash of the branch.

tools.name: list_commits
tools.description: Get list of commits for a GitHub repository branch.

sha.description: The branch name or commit SHA.

commits.description: List of commits matching the criteria.

date.description: The commit date in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: List issues in a GitHub repository with filtering options.

issues.description: List of issues matching the criteria.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: update_issue
tools.description: Update an existing issue in a GitHub repository.

updated_at.description: The update timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: add_issue_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to an existing issue.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: close_issue
tools.description: Close an existing issue in a GitHub repository.

closed_at.description: The closing timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search for code in GitHub repositories.

q.description: The search query using GitHub code search syntax.

sort.description: The field to sort results by.

per_page.description: The number of results per page (max 100).

path.description: The file path containing the code.

line_number.description: The line number of the code.

tools.name: search_issues
tools.description: Search for issues and pull requests in GitHub repositories.

q.description: The search query using GitHub issue search syntax.

sort.description: The field to sort results by.

per_page.description: The number of results per page (max 100).

issues.description: List of issues and pull requests matching the search criteria.

tools.name: search_users
tools.description: Search for users on GitHub.

q.description: The search query using GitHub user search syntax.

sort.description: The field to sort results by.

per_page.description: The number of results per page (max 100).

users.description: List of users matching the search criteria.

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Get detailed information for a specific issue.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: The update timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: get_pull_request
tools.description: Get detailed information for a specific pull request.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: The update timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: list_pull_requests
tools.description: List and filter pull requests in a repository.

pull_requests.description: List of pull requests matching the criteria.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: create_pull_request_review
tools.description: Create a review for a pull request.

submitted_at.description: The submission timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: merge_pull_request
tools.description: Merge a pull request.

merged.description: Whether the PR was successfully merged.

merge_commit_sha.description: The SHA hash of the merge commit.

tools.name: get_pull_request_files
tools.description: Get list of files changed in a pull request.

files.description: List of files changed in the pull request.

tools.name: get_pull_request_status
tools.description: Get comprehensive status of all status checks for a pull request.

tools.name: update_pull_request_branch
tools.description: Update pull request branch with latest changes from base branch.

updated.description: Whether the branch was successfully updated.

tools.name: get_pull_request_comments
tools.description: Get review comments for a pull request.

user.description: The user who made the comment.

created_at.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: get_pull_request_reviews
tools.description: Get reviews for a pull request.

user.description: The user who submitted the review.

submitted_at.description: The submission timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

tools.name: list_user_repositories
tools.description: List repositories for the current user.

type.description: Repository type (all, owner, public, private, member).

repositories.description: List of repositories for the current user.

tools.name: get_github_user_info
tools.description: Get GitHub user information for the current authenticated user.
